mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM im_conversation c INNER JOIN im_conversation_member m ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id FROM im_conversation c WHERE c.conversation_type = 'PRIVATE' AND c.id IN (SELECT conversation_id FROM im_conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{user1}) AND c.id IN (SELECT conversation_id FROM im_conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{user2}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_conversation(conversation_type, group_name, creator_id) VALUES(#{conversationType}, #{groupName}, #{creatorId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM im_conversation_member WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM im_conversation_member WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_message(conversation_id, sender_id, content_type, content, status) VALUES(#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{status})
